title: Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain (55 cm)
short_description: A 55 cm silver-tone Miami curb flat chain with high-polish interlocking links — a sleek, everyday layering piece for men and women.
body_html:
Meet the Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain — a 55 cm silver-tone statement built from tightly interlocking curb links pressed flat for a smooth, ribbon-like drape against the skin. The high-polish finish catches light with every movement, giving you that clean, modern shine without the loud shimmer.

Cut in the classic Miami curb pattern, the links sit flush and lie flat at the collarbone, so the chain reads sharp on its own and layers beautifully under a pendant or beside thinner chains. Slim enough for daily wear, bold enough to notice.

  • Length: 55 cm — a versatile mid-length drop that suits most necklines.
  • Design: Flat Miami curb links for a sleek, smooth-lying profile.
  • Finish: Bright silver-tone high polish.
  • Style: Unisex — made for him and her.

Whether you wear it solo for a minimal look or stack it for a layered edge, this is the kind of chain that quietly upgrades every outfit.
seo_title: Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 55 cm | Studd Muffyn
seo_description: Silver-tone Miami curb flat chain, 55 cm, high-polish interlocking links. Sleek unisex everyday chain for layering. Only ₹699 at Studd Muffyn.

metafields.highlights: 55 cm silver-tone Miami curb flat chain · High-polish interlocking links · Smooth flat-lying drape · Unisex everyday wear · Layers or stands alone
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Silver-tone metal, Miami curb flat-link construction, high-polish finish.
metafields.care_or_directions: Wipe with a soft dry cloth after wear. Keep away from water, perfume and sweat to preserve shine. Store flat in a dry pouch to prevent scratches and tangling.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.a: It is 55 cm long — a versatile mid-length that sits neatly at the collarbone and suits most necklines for both men and women.

faqs.q: Is this chain for men or women?
faqs.a: Both. The clean Miami curb design is unisex, so it looks great worn by him or her, solo or layered.

faqs.q: Can I wear it in the shower or while swimming?
faqs.a: We recommend keeping it away from water, sweat and perfume. Take it off before showering or swimming and wipe it dry after wear to keep the shine bright and long-lasting.

faqs.q: Will it lie flat or roll on the neck?
faqs.a: The links are pressed flat in the Miami curb pattern, so the chain lies smooth and flat against the skin instead of rolling.

faqs.q: Can I add a pendant to it?
faqs.a: Yes. The flat curb links make a clean base for a pendant, and it also layers beautifully alongside thinner chains.

page_blocks.subtitle: Sleek Flat Drape | High-Polish Shine | Unisex Everyday Wear
page_blocks.product_brief: The Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain is a 55 cm silver-tone piece built from tightly interlocking curb links pressed flat for a smooth, ribbon-like drape. Its bright high-polish finish and clean unisex profile make it perfect worn solo or layered under a pendant.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Silver-Tone Metal – bright, clean shine that reads modern and premium
✦ Miami Curb Flat Links – tightly interlocked and pressed flat for a smooth, flush drape
✦ High-Polish Finish – mirror-like surface that catches light with every movement
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Lies Perfectly Flat
The flat curb construction keeps the chain flush against the skin instead of rolling or twisting.
✨ Everyday Versatile Length
55 cm sits neatly at the collarbone and works with tees, shirts and ethnic wear alike.
✨ Layer It or Wear It Solo
Clean links make an ideal base for a pendant or a stacked, layered look.
✨ Unisex By Design
A sharp, minimal silhouette made to look good on him and her.
✨ Catches The Light
The high-polish silver-tone shine adds a subtle, confident glow to any outfit.

detail_points: ✨ Sleek flat Miami curb links that lie smooth against the skin
📏 55 cm versatile mid-length drop for most necklines

page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain
Design: Miami curb, flat link
Material: Silver-tone metal
Color: Silver
Length: 55 cm
Style: Unisex
Net Quantity: 1 chain
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Fasten the chain at the back of the neck and let it settle at the collarbone.
2. Wear it solo for a clean minimal look, or add a pendant for a personal touch.
3. Layer it beside thinner chains for a stacked, on-trend finish.
4. Wipe with a soft dry cloth after wear and store flat in a dry pouch.
